description_long: This is a modern bolt-action sniper rifle with a matte olive-green chassis and a black adjustable stock. The rifle features a long, cylindrical barrel fitted with a suppressor at the muzzle, enhancing its stealth capabilities. A large telescopic scope is mounted on top, providing precision aiming for long-range engagements. The stock is robust and includes a cheek rest and a butt pad for shooter comfort and stability. The trigger guard and magazine well are visible, with a detachable box magazine likely housed within. The overall design is sleek and utilitarian, suitable for tactical use in urban environments.
description: A modern bolt-action sniper rifle with an olive-green chassis, black adjustable stock, long suppressed barrel, and a mounted telescopic scope.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow profile of the suppressor, barrel, and scope aligned in a straight line.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the rifle, including the olive-green chassis, black stock, scope, and suppressor.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the buttstock, cheek rest, and the alignment of the scope and barrel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the rifle's profile, including the scope, suppressor, and details of the stock and trigger area.
